text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

90 
ESRD_COND_CD 
LABEL: 
End Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Condition Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code indicating if the beneficiary had an end stage renal disease (ESRD) condition reported during 
the stay. 
SHORT NAME: ESRD_CD 
LONG NAME: ESRD_COND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
00 = No dialysis or ESRD services 
71 = Billing is for a patient who received staff
